module_info.docstring:
Stranger-perspective correctness audit for interwatch.

Validates user-facing documentation against project reality by gathering
ground truth (actual counts, existing files, build commands, versions)
and dispatching to a review agent that checks each doc from a context-free
perspective.

Complements interwatch-scan.py: scan measures freshness (has the world
changed?), audit measures correctness (does the doc match reality?).

Usage:
    python3 interwatch-audit.py                    # Audit all eligible docs
    python3 interwatch-audit.py --check README.md  # Audit a single doc
    python3 interwatch-audit.py --gather-only      # Print ground truth JSON, skip audit

functions.name: run_cmd
functions.docstring: Run a command and return stdout, or empty string on failure.

functions.name: gather_component_counts
functions.docstring: Count skills, commands, agents, hooks in the current project.

functions.name: gather_file_existence
functions.docstring: Check which referenced files actually exist.

functions.name: gather_version_info
functions.docstring: Gather version information from various sources.

functions.name: gather_directory_structure
functions.docstring: Gather top-level directory structure for architecture validation.

functions.name: gather_prerequisites
functions.docstring: Check which common prerequisites are installed.

functions.name: gather_cross_doc_consistency
functions.docstring:
Extract comparable claims from related docs for cross-doc validation.

Finds doc pairs that should agree (vision+roadmap, etc.), extracts
bead ID sets and count claims from each, and flags mismatches.
The audit agent uses this to check cross-doc consistency.

functions.name: _discover_doc_groups
functions.docstring:
Find groups of related docs that should agree on facts.

Auto-discovers vision+roadmap pairs by convention:
docs/{module}-vision.md + docs/{module}-roadmap.md

functions.name: extract_links_from_doc
functions.docstring: Extract markdown links and file references from a document.

functions.name: find_audit_eligible_docs
functions.docstring:
Find user-facing documentation files eligible for correctness audit.

Looks for:
- README.md (always user-facing)
- docs/guide-*.md (user guides)
- CONTRIBUTING.md
- install scripts

functions.name: gather_ground_truth
functions.docstring: Assemble all ground truth data for the audit agent.

functions.name: generate_audit_prompt
functions.docstring: Generate the prompt for the stranger-perspective audit agent.
